review_highlights.comment: I usually earn good grades through effort and participation. In this class, grading felt focused more on small writing details than on overall understanding and effort. Trotta is not the supportive, student-centered professor people describe. It often feels like she does not meet students where they are, and the expectations can seem unclear and discouraging. Instead of feeling supported, many students feel stressed and overwhelmed. I would carefully reconsider before taking her.

the glowing reviews are completely misleading. Her lectures are confusing, disorganized, and nearly impossible to follow. Students are left floundering to understand even the simplest concepts, and the class feels like a punishing exercise rather than a learning experience. She presents herself as an expert, but her cold, elitist demeanor and obsession with abstract psychological theory make her utterly incapable of providing anything of real-world value. Always available to help understand concepts but you need to put in lots lots  of effort and show you want to learn. All classes hands on and  shows you so many tricks. Part of DoD cyber warrior program - pretty serious stuff.
